productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Women Yoga Navy Capri
description: CompositionStretchable easy-Fit capris in navy blue made of 100% cotton with spandex technology, drawstrings and soft elastic waistband and flattened seamFit ComfortWash careWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)Do not wring or bleachFlat dry in shadeDo not iron on printThis pair of navy blue capris from urban yoga is an essential garment in a woman's wardrobe. Specially designed with spandex for easy movement, the cotton fabric keeps you dry, comfortable and fresh. Any hard seam like zippers or buttons have been carefully avoided for a comfort feel. The stitch detailing in a contrast colour adds a stylish touch, while the drawstrings with urban yoga branding all over them can either be showed off as a bow or tucked in to alter between a funky and prim look. The brand tag has been printed and consciously not stitched so that nothing comes between you and comfort. You can couple this comfort fit capirs with stylish tops - a slim fit one for exercise regimes or a loose fit one for casual occasions.    Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 36"Height-5'6”, Waist - 32”, Hips – 35”
